topic: My wireless earbuds play soft whispering when nothing is connected to them.
title: My Earbuds Whisper When Nothing Is Connected | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My wireless earbuds whisper to me when nothing is connected.
scenes.image_prompt: a single white wireless earbud resting on a dark wooden table, faint light glinting off it, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I work from home and wear them all day.
scenes.image_prompt: a cluttered home desk with a laptop and an open earbud case, dim afternoon light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First it was just static. Soft and low.
scenes.image_prompt: an earbud close on a desk surface, faint blue charging glow, fog, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the static began shaping itself into words.
scenes.image_prompt: an earbud lying in shadow with a faint sound-wave reflection on the desk, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the phone. Nothing was paired.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen showing an empty bluetooth device list, dark room, blue glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The whisper kept describing the room I was sitting in.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim living room seen from a low angle, a single earbud glowing on the arm of a chair, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left them in their case overnight to be sure.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed earbud case on a nightstand, faint light leaking from the seam, dark bedroom, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the case was warm and still whispering.
scenes.image_prompt: hands holding a slightly open earbud case, faint glow inside, dim morning light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It started saying my name, then asking me to come closer.
scenes.image_prompt: a single earbud on a pillow in a dark room, soft glow, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night it whispered that it was already inside the house.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim hallway viewed from a doorway, a faint glowing earbud on the floor far down it, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw them away. I bought a new pair.
scenes.image_prompt: a kitchen bin lid open with an earbud case dropped inside, dim kitchen light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new ones whispered the same name on the very first day.
scenes.image_prompt: a brand new sealed earbud box on a counter, faint glow leaking from the lid seam, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
